merlin_thesis: NAS100 at 29,027 after -6% correction from ATH 30,808. D1 bearish: -DI(25.4) >> +DI(13.9), ADX 33, below 5/20-day MAs. Price in discount (31.6% of 28,206-30,808 range). Stochastics near oversold (25.8%). Alfred MT5 offline — no H4/M15 data. Bearish structure but deep discount limits downside. NO_GO — Layer 3 blind.
